mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_organization WHERE company_id = #{companyId} AND level != '3' ORDER BY code
SELECT * FROM sys_organization WHERE company_id = #{companyId} AND parent_id = '-1'

SELECT a.id, a.name, a.parent_id, a.code, a.company_id, a.level, a.tele, a.address, a.bank_name, a.corpotate_account, a.business_license, a.remark, a.province, a.city, a.county, a.street, a.longitude, a.latitude, (SELECT name FROM sys_organization WHERE id = a.parent_id) AS parentName FROM sys_organization a WHERE a.id = #{id}
SELECT a.org_id AS 'id', b.name FROM pr_data_grant a LEFT JOIN sys_organization b ON a.org_id = b.id WHERE a.user_id = #{userId}
SELECT * FROM sys_organization WHERE id IN ( SELECT DISTINCT b.parent_id FROM pr_data_grant a LEFT JOIN sys_organization b ON a.org_id = b.id WHERE a.user_id = #{userId} ) AND level = '1'
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM pr_data_grant WHERE org_id = #{id} AND company_id = #{companyId}
